caption:
The neon rain hissed against my synthetic jacket, a rhythm I knew better than my own heartbeat. 🌧️💜 I slipped into the shadow of the mega-structure, my magnetic boots humming with stolen energy. Tonight, I wasn't just a courier; I was a ghost in the machine, and ghosts are rarely followed.

My outfit hugged every curve, the sleek black latex of the cyberpunk biker jacket clinging tightly to my waist before flowing into sheer panels that hinted at what lay beneath. Big, heavy breathing from my pursuers echoed in the damp alley, but I smiled. My body was armor, my curves a distraction.

I adjusted the strap of my utility belt, the cool metal biting into my skin as I crouched. A client had promised a fortune, and I always take the money I was promised. My hands danced over the holo-controls on my wrist, pulling up a decryption code while a shadowy figure lunged.

"You're fast," the man growled, his cybernetic arm whining.

"And you're loud," I whispered, my voice low and sultry against the static. 💋

I spun, my leather skirt swaying, and fired a pulse shot. The explosion of light framed my silhouette, making me look like I was made of lightning and shadow. As the rain washed over my hair, droplets sliding down the collarbone and into the deep V of my jacket, I felt the heat of the moment.

The chase would end soon, but until then, I owned the night. 🌃🔥

#CyberpunkQueen #NeonHeist #StealthMode #FutureFashion #CurvesAndCode #NightCityLife #DigitalGoddess
